allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import yaml; data = yaml.safe_load\(open\(''elysian_core/config/config.yaml''\)\); print\(''YAML valid''\); print\(''risk keys:'', list\(data.get\(''risk'', {}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\(''portfolio keys:'', list\(data.get\(''portfolio'', {}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\(''execution keys:'', list\(data.get\(''execution'', {}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\(''strategy keys:'', list\(data.get\(''strategy'', {}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
